allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('jspdf:', deps['jspdf']||'NO'\); console.log\('pdfmake:', deps['pdfmake']||'NO'\); console.log\('@react-pdf/renderer:', deps['@react-pdf/renderer']||'NO'\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('jspdf-autotable:', deps['jspdf-autotable']||'NO'\); console.log\('jspdf version:', deps['jspdf']\);")
